items.titolo: Meta Contractors Posed as Teens to Prompt Rival Chatbots About Suicide, Sex, and Drugs
items.descrizione: Hundreds of contractors working on a project for Meta pretended to be kids in order to see how other chatbots like Gemini and ChatGPT would respond to high-risk subjects, WIRED found.

items.titolo: Google Meet, gli appunti automatici di Gemini anche per abbonati AI Pro e Ultra
items.descrizione: Google ha esteso la funzione agli abbonati a AI Pro e Google AI Ultra

items.titolo: Chinese Z.ai's latest model tops AI ranking charts amid Anthropic Fable 5 ban — blacklisted China firm's popular open-weight GLM-5.2 AI model powered by Huawei silicon
items.descrizione: Within a week of Fable's ban, GLM-5.2 had climbed to the top of the openly available leaderboards.
